label: experimental/frontier
method: Reanalysis only (no Whisper / no ASR / no LLM). Extrapolated bootstrap: treat the 77 per-window cpWER values as the empirical population F_hat; for each target n draw B=10000 resamples of size n WITH replacement from F_hat and compute the BCa CI (RQ39 framework, jackknife acceleration on the 77-value population). CI width scales as ~1/sqrt(n). At n=77 the extrapolated BCa reproduces RQ39's BCa CI [1.012987, 1.097403] bit-for-bit (H64a reproducibility check). Two routers analysed: (1) lang-id corrected router (threshold 0.38, RQ39/RQ55, cpWER 1.0433); (2) KL-corrected router (RQ58, cpWER 1.0303, per-window data read from RQ58's JSON).

thresholds.note: lang_id_entropy threshold 0.38 (RQ55 convention). Verified identical routing to RQ13's 0.409 operating point on AISHELL-4 (no window has entropy in (0.38, 0.409]).

bootstrap.convention: rng.integers(0, n_pop, size=n_target) per resample (RQ39 verbatim, chunked)

lang_id_corrected_router.name: lang_id_corrected_router_rq39

H64a.statement: At n=77, BCa CI includes oracle (baseline confirmation). KILLED if already excludes.

H64b.statement: Required n to exclude oracle > 770 (10x current). KILLED if <= 770.
H64b.reason: BCa CI first excludes oracle at n=105. <= 770 -> tractable (KILLED).

H64c.statement: Effect size (corrected - oracle) < 0.01 (practically negligible). KILLED if >= 0.01.

lang_id_corrected_router.verdict_reason: Effect size 0.025974 >= 0.01 (gap is real) and BCa CI excludes oracle at n=105 (<= 2464). More data would resolve the 'includes oracle' verdict. Sample-size problem.

kl_corrected_router.name: kl_corrected_router_rq58

H64a.statement: At n=77, BCa CI includes oracle (baseline confirmation). KILLED if already excludes.

H64b.statement: Required n to exclude oracle > 770 (10x current). KILLED if <= 770.
H64b.reason: BCa CI first excludes oracle at n=250. <= 770 -> tractable (KILLED).

H64c.statement: Effect size (corrected - oracle) < 0.01 (practically negligible). KILLED if >= 0.01.

kl_corrected_router.verdict_reason: Effect size 0.012987 >= 0.01 (gap is real) and BCa CI excludes oracle at n=250 (<= 2464). More data would resolve the 'includes oracle' verdict. Sample-size problem.
